summary: Session 1 shipped the dual-host git-workflow automation core (operator directive 2026-07-14: Azure DevOps today, enterprise GitHub later). New pure host-detection module (utils/gitHost.ts: remote-URL classification + org/project/repo parsing across all ADO/GitHub URL forms, dabblerSessionSets.gitHost override for GHE custom domains, create-PR web-URL builders as the no-CLI floor), host-CLI preflight (utils/hostCli.ts: gh/az probe mirroring copilotCli.ts, explicit-setting-decides-alone, win32 .exe/.cmd/.bat shapes, per-host install/auth guidance), and the two confirm-gated commands (commands/gitWorkflow.ts): 'Dabbler: Open PR for this set' (push + gh pr create / az repos pr create with coordinates derived from the remote, templated body, PR URL reported on both hosts, degradation floor = push + create-PR web page) and 'Dabbler: Finalize merged set' (pull --ff-only, worktree remove, branch -d, fetch --prune; idempotent; refuses dirty tree / non-trunk / linked-worktree workspaces; never -D or --force). 95 new unit tests + package.json surface pins (suite 1713 green; pytest 3030 passed/6 skipped baseline). Committed real-git dogfood harness (src/test/dogfood/) which pre-verification caught the get-url/insteadOf detection defect. Live-host walks armed as operator UAT (ADO priority) per the operator's same-day deferral. Verification: discovery round 1 (gpt-5-6, reduced fan-out 1/2 after provider timeouts) found 1 Major (ADO percent-encoded names) + 6 nits; supplementary round 2 VERIFIED (nothing new); remediated once (Major + 4 nits fixed, 2 deferred with reasons in s1-remediation-round-1.md); remediation-review round 3 VERIFIED, fix accepted. Close backstop round 4 then blocked on the substituted live GitHub dogfood; remediated by EXECUTION (gh was authenticated locally): committed double-gated live harness opened a REAL PR on scratch repo darndestdabbler/dabbler-s102-dogfood-scratch (pull/1), merged it, finalized, all end-state assertions green; remediation-review round 5 VERIFIED (2 accepted). Residual: operator may delete the scratch repo (token lacks delete_repo); ADO live walk remains the armed operator UAT per the standing deferral. Total verification cost ~$0.58.

reason.specifics: Routed step-3.5 analysis (s1-ai-assignment-analysis.json, excl. anthropic): Session 2 (release tag + hotfix/rollback commands) is smaller, pure-git, and mechanical after Session 1 laid the host adapter and command patterns; a frontier-tier orchestrator is wasteful there. Runner-up: gpt/openai gpt-5-4-mini for provider diversity.
